title: Integrate Multiple Zoom Accounts on a Monday Board
excerpt:
Hi! 
Is there a way where i can integrate multiple Zoom Accounts on a single board? 
Or a way where I won’t need to let every user with the company email integrate my the board? 
Thanks!

posts.author: mfornaleza (Nette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
Is there a way where i can integrate multiple Zoom Accounts on a single board?
Or a way where I won’t need to let every user with the company email integrate my the board?
Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nette,

I don’t believe there’s a limitation on the amount of zoom accounts you can connect, that said, you’d need to connect a seperate account for each recipe. Let me know if you run into any issues
